sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الطَّبْخُ مَهَارَةٌ مُفِيدَةٌ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَهَا كُلُّ شَخْصٍ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, kuhanje je korisna vještina koju svaka osoba treba naučiti.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, cooking is a useful skill that every person should learn.

sentences.arabic: مَنْ يَطْبُخُ يَسْتَطِيعُ الِاعْتِمَادَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ko zna kuhati može se osloniti na sebe.
sentences.translationEn: A person who cooks can rely on themselves.

sentences.arabic: الطَّبْخُ أَيْضًا نَشَاطٌ مُمْتِعٌ يُقَرِّبُ الْعَائِلَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kuhanje je i zabavna aktivnost koja zbližava porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: Cooking is also an enjoyable activity that brings the family closer.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ أَنْ أُجَرِّبَ طَبَخَ أَطْبَاقٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translationEn: I like trying to cook new dishes.
